Both avatars generated and saved. Here's what each looks like:

**Avatar A — "The Contemptuous Duellist"**
`/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/adelbert_a.gif` (6 frames, 3.6 KB)

An isometric 3/4 front view of a slicked-hair suited figure standing behind a desk. His right arm raises and the index finger jabs accusatorially toward the viewer in a 3-step jab cycle — out, held with narrowed brows (contempt peak), retract. ...(truncated)
